case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION;$4960 US CURRENCY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1536 AND ORDER TO DEPOSIT MONEY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION;$4960 US CURRENCY $4,960.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,960.00, - JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR RESPECTIVE COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY'S FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
